name: DEFECT/DAMAGED PACKAGE CLEARANCE: Proline Puppy Food - Chicken 15kg
shortDescription: Fully balanced all natural puppy food with chicken protein plus brewer's yeast and whey protein for immune support? and omega -3 and -6 from flaxseed. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of growing puppies.
description: Proline Puppy Food - Chicken , fully balanced all natural puppy food with chicken protein plus brewer's yeast and whey protein for immune support and omega -3 and -6 from flaxseed. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of growing puppies. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein................................. 28% Fat ......................... ............16% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) .................. 4% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein, Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Wheat Middlings, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beeet, Chicken Liver Aroma, Rice, Salt, Whey Powder, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer?s Yeast. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan.
